title: BYD's passenger EV sales drop for an eighth month as competition heats up
summary_full: BYD's deliveries fell for an eighth straight month in April, while Stellantis-backed Leapmotor logged a record number of deliveries
summary_public: BYD's deliveries fell for an eighth straight month in April, while Stellantis-backed Leapmotor logged a record number of deliveries
